text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin continues working part-time jobs and
sending money back to her family. It looks like
she's doing her best as the older sister of the
household.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's not holding back when it comes to race
prep either. And apparently, her coworkers are
even helping out by letting her adjust her work
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines is determined to do her best. After all, she's
also running for all those who see their hopes and
dreams in her.
